---
title: "Orphaned Epics"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("data/orphan-epics.json"), Path("../data/orphan-epics.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/orphan-epics.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report orphan-epics"
    )

d       = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group   = d["group"]
orphans = d["orphans"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>An <strong>orphaned epic</strong> has no parent and no children — it is completely
disconnected from the portfolio hierarchy.</p>
""")
```

```{python}
if not orphans:
    display(HTML("<p>✅ No orphaned epics found.</p>"))
else:
    html = f"<p><strong>{len(orphans)} orphaned epic(s) found.</strong></p>"
    html += """
<table class="table table-sm table-striped">
  <thead><tr><th>Title</th><th>Type</th><th>State</th></tr></thead>
  <tbody>
"""
    for row in orphans:
        link = f'<a href="{row["url"]}" target="_blank">{row["icon"]} {row["title"]}</a>' if row["url"] else f'{row["icon"]} {row["title"]}'
        html += f"<tr><td>{link}</td><td>{row['type']}</td><td>{row['state']}</td></tr>"
    html += "  </tbody>\n</table>"
    display(HTML(html))
```
